title: Empty query passed to AI Agent Tool
symptom: The main agent sends an empty input to the AI Agent Tool despite specific instructions, resulting in no data being queried from the database.
applies_when: Providing specific instructions to the main agent
not_this_if: The main agent successfully queries the database with valid input
root_cause: The main agent fails to format the input correctly for the AI Agent Tool, leading to an empty query being sent. This often occurs when the input is not properly referenced or constructed using the required syntax.
fix_steps: Use the `$fromAI` formula in the main agent's input to reference the AI Agent Tool's output.
Ensure that the input to the AI Agent Tool is correctly formatted and includes necessary keywords.
agent_instruction: Implement the `$fromAI` formula to correctly pass the input to the AI Agent Tool.
